## Does this require an ADR?

<!-- Significant architecture decisions (new auth strategy, breaking API changes, new data models) need an ADR before code. See CONTRIBUTING.md — ADR Process. -->

- [ ] Yes — I'll open a discussion before coding
- [ ] No — this is a small additive change
